data.title: Zero Trust Security
data.description: Adopts a Zero Trust security model to safeguard access and networks.
data.technical_spec: Verification of identity for every access attempt.

data.title: Encryption at Rest and in Transit
data.description: Encrypts data both at rest and during transit to protect information.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 for storage encryption, TLS for data in transit.

data.title: Security Incident Detection
data.description: Monitors for suspicious behavior and potential security threats continuously.
data.technical_spec: Employs machine learning algorithms for anomaly detection.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Advanced protection against Distributed Denial-of-Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Global server load balancing and filtering techniques.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Strict control over user and device access to resources.
data.technical_spec: OPA-based policy management and multi-factor authentication.
